/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libvision_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libvision_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/vision_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/vision_msgs/msg/detail/target_coord__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/proxima/vision_msgs/build/vision_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libvision_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
